answer:
Systeme.io provides a self-serve public REST API available to users on all plans, including the free tier [1][2][3]. To use it, generate an API key within your dashboard under the Public API keys section of your profile settings [1].

You must include this key in the X-API-Key header of your requests [1]. For security, perform all API calls from a server-side environment rather than public-facing pages [1]. The API supports programmatic management of contacts, tags, courses, funnels, and pages, and includes webhooks [1][2][4].
